_comment: Committed + shared by both machines. Required by scripts/start-box and scripts/console. brain.executorHost = the box's LAN IP works from the laptop AND the box (the box reaches its own IP; executor binds 0.0.0.0). bridgeDir MUST match BRIDGE_DIR in mqbridge/bridge.lua. Env vars (EQ_*) still override per-machine if ever needed.
_relay_comment: How the executor relays a command to a named client. {peer}=target name, {cmd}=command to run on it. DanNet's /dex bypasses the client's #/^ chat-command routing (server cmds aren't parsed), so we use e3next's targeted broadcast, which runs the command locally on the peer. Change here if your e3 targeted-broadcast command differs.

executor._comment: How the executor (on the 32 GB box) binds. host 0.0.0.0 = reachable across the LAN.

brain._comment: Where the brain (laptop) sends intents. Set executorHost to the BOX's LAN IP for cross-LAN; 127.0.0.1 if testing on one machine.
